entryPointCandidates.name: App.tsx
entryPointCandidates.summary: Root application component that configures the React Router, wraps routes with authentication guards and subscription providers, and handles role-based access control for tenant and super-admin users.

entryPointCandidates.name: README.md
entryPointCandidates.summary: Project overview for Nunua Polepole — a multi-tenant business directory and credit management platform. Covers core features, superadmin capabilities, local development setup, and the technology stack (Vite, React, TypeScript, shadcn/ui, Tailwind CSS, Supabase).

entryPointCandidates.name: main.tsx
entryPointCandidates.summary: Application entry point that mounts the React root, wrapping the App component with the shared QueryClientProvider.

entryPointCandidates.name: index.ts
entryPointCandidates.summary: Supabase Edge Function that handles Paystack webhook events for subscription lifecycle management, including charge success, subscription creation, invoice payments, and cancellations. Verifies HMAC-SHA512 signatures, manages plan upgrades/downgrades with proration, logs billing history, and syncs tenant feature flags and usage metrics.

entryPointCandidates.name: index.ts
entryPointCandidates.summary: Supabase Edge Function that resets user passwords by generating a random 6-digit PIN, looking up user accounts by phone number via the profiles table, updating all matched user accounts, and sending the PIN via Africa's Talking SMS API with allowlist enforcement.

documentation.name: README.md
documentation.summary: Project overview for Nunua Polepole — a multi-tenant business directory and credit management platform. Covers core features, superadmin capabilities, local development setup, and the technology stack (Vite, React, TypeScript, shadcn/ui, Tailwind CSS, Supabase).

documentation.name: ARCHITECTURE.md
documentation.summary: Comprehensive domain-driven architecture guide for the Lipia Pole Pole credit management platform, covering 15 sections including bounded contexts, entity relationships, state machines, multi-tenancy patterns, authentication/authorization with RBAC, API layer patterns, error handling, and coding conventions.

documentation.name: DEVELOPER.md
documentation.summary: Developer-focused guide covering the multi-tenant SaaS architecture, database ERD with key tables, project directory structure, and step-by-step instructions for adding database migrations, new API endpoints, and Supabase Edge Functions.

documentation.name: ROLES.md
documentation.summary: Reference document for the platform's role-based access control (RBAC) system, defining the four-tier role hierarchy (Superadmin, Owner, Staff, Client), their respective permissions, and how roles are enforced at both the Supabase RLS database layer and the React frontend layer.

documentation.name: robots.txt
documentation.summary: Robots exclusion file allowing all web crawlers unrestricted access to the site, with a sitemap reference pointing to the production domain.

infrastructure.name: main.yml
infrastructure.summary: GitHub Actions workflow that triggers on every push to main, builds the Vite/React project, and force-pushes the compiled dist output to a dedicated dist branch for deployment.

infrastructure.name: deploy-dist
infrastructure.summary: Single CI job running on ubuntu-latest that checks out the repo, installs Node 18 dependencies, builds the project, and publishes the dist output to the dist branch via force-push.

data.name: tenants
data.summary: Core tenants table representing business organizations in the multi-tenant platform, with phone number uniqueness constraints and timestamps.

data.name: profiles
data.summary: User profile records linked to both auth users and tenants, storing display name and contact information with phone validation.

data.name: user_roles
data.summary: Join table assigning app_role enum values (admin, user) to auth users, with a unique constraint per user-role pair.

data.name: clients
data.summary: Client records scoped to a tenant, tracking contact information, account balance, and status with phone format validation.

data.name: products
data.summary: Product catalog entries scoped to a tenant with name, price, and optional description.

data.name: invoices
data.summary: Invoice records linking tenants and clients with invoice number uniqueness per tenant, amount, status, and optional notes.

data.name: transactions
data.summary: Financial transaction records of type 'sale' or 'payment', linked to tenant, client, and optionally an invoice.

data.name: 20251013111652_2112e2fa-4ab5-4a26-a099-668c9c53e422.sql
data.summary: Initial schema migration establishing the core multi-tenant data model: tenants, profiles, user_roles, clients, products, invoices, and transactions tables with RLS policies, helper functions, and performance indexes.

data.name: 20251013111722_13b9afc3-22a7-4486-ad66-df27906b1a62.sql
data.summary: Security fix migration that patches the update_updated_at_column trigger function to set search_path, closing a potential schema injection vulnerability.

data.name: 20251015063134_57ca11aa-1900-4de9-b6e3-a67c3e774699.sql
data.summary: Alters the clients table to make phone_number required and name/email optional, and adds a unique constraint on phone_number per tenant.

data.name: 20251015122022_1a3c4a0d-bf79-4c4b-b95d-6d5096f663f5.sql
data.summary: Creates the client_details view joining clients, invoices, and transactions to expose total_invoiced and total_paid aggregates, and adds several performance indexes.

data.name: 20251015122229_ff79d4e9-c23c-4fef-ba7d-4aa635163522.sql
data.summary: Recreates the client_details view with security_invoker = true so it respects the querying user's RLS policies rather than bypassing them.

data.name: 20251015130904_73b74a13-ff7b-47c7-90e7-1740050ff2f2.sql
data.summary: Adds the 'client' value to the app_role enum to support client-facing authenticated access.

data.name: 20251015190746_375e4b33-ba67-41ef-9624-7c1dbafc120d.sql
data.summary: Introduces the update_client_status trigger function to automatically recalculate and update a client's status (open/closed) after any change to invoices or transactions.

data.name: 20251015190810_5faec757-77c9-4fcb-8440-590ca6deeeb0.sql
data.summary: Security fix that drops and recreates the update_client_status function and its triggers with SECURITY DEFINER and a fixed search_path.

data.name: 20251015192346_18fd6657-87d2-4dd8-8195-616e9ea7ba81.sql
data.summary: Further refines the update_client_status function by adding it to the public schema with proper SECURITY DEFINER and search_path settings.

data.name: 20251016065143_82266887-cad1-4150-a5c9-496b797340e2.sql
data.summary: Adds an optional product_id foreign key column to the invoices table to support product-linked invoices, with a performance index.

data.name: 20251016070618_b0505774-97b8-4d57-af3c-d1e33afa64fe.sql
data.summary: Extends the invoices table status column to accept 'partial' as a valid value alongside pending, paid, and overdue, using a check constraint.

data.name: notifications
data.summary: Notifications table storing per-user, per-tenant alerts for invoice, payment, client, product, and system events with read status and deep-link support.

data.name: 20251016072528_a8fe3e42-6dd3-4a3e-8aa5-900e7c62d2a5.sql
data.summary: Creates the notifications table with RLS policies, an updated_at trigger, performance indexes, and enables Supabase Realtime for the table.

data.name: 20251018093444_5d49a42c-309b-46b4-9222-293cf07bf193.sql
data.summary: Adds client-facing RLS policies to invoices and clients tables so authenticated clients can view their own records based on a phone number encoded in their JWT email.

data.name: payment_details
data.summary: Payment configuration table for tenants to store M-Pesa Paybill and Till payment options with active/inactive toggles.

data.name: 20251104064235_55f253d9-d7ff-40ea-baef-a0ebbfd26698.sql
data.summary: Creates the payment_details table with RLS policies for tenant admins and clients to view active payment options (M-Pesa Paybill/Till), plus an updated_at trigger.

data.name: 20251109131639_345e95b5-dfd7-47ac-a35e-8854ca4ef7a3.sql
data.summary: Updates client-facing RLS policies on clients, invoices, and payment_details tables to use a new tenant-specific email format that encodes both phone and tenant ID.

data.name: 20251221141116_3d237c03-d4ca-465d-92ce-68afd17f286c.sql
data.summary: Adds the update_invoice_status_on_payment trigger function implementing a pending → partial → paid state machine, fired after any transaction change.

data.name: 20251221141143_e23df4d7-cc88-4e9c-8d7f-7efc30e20e4f.sql
data.summary: Implements domain event-driven notification triggers: create_payment_notification fires after each payment transaction and create_invoice_notification fires after each invoice insert, writing records to the notifications table.

data.name: 20260127155500_add_superadmin_role.sql
data.summary: Adds 'superadmin' to the app_role enum and updates RLS policies on tenants, profiles, and user_roles so superadmins can read all rows across all tenants.

data.name: 20260127203127_add_subscription_tiers.sql
data.summary: Introduces the subscription_tier enum (monthly, semi-annual, annual) and adds subscription_tier and is_active columns to the tenants table; also grants superadmins visibility over all transactions and invoices.

data.name: 20260127224000_superadmin_rls_expansion.sql
data.summary: Expands superadmin SELECT visibility to the clients, products, and invoices tables by replacing tenant-scoped policies with has_role-gated alternatives.

data.name: 20260127230000_comprehensive_superadmin_rls.sql
data.summary: Comprehensive RLS expansion ensuring superadmins can SELECT across all core tables: profiles, clients, products, invoices, transactions, and user_roles.

data.name: 20260127233000_superadmin_tenant_update_rls.sql
data.summary: Grants superadmins UPDATE access on the tenants table for managing activation state and subscription tiers.

data.name: 20260128110000_superadmin_user_management_rls.sql
data.summary: Grants superadmins full CRUD access on user_roles and refines the profile SELECT policy, also adding a foreign key from user_roles.user_id to profiles.user_id.

data.name: 20260326193736_673b14aa-788f-45bf-ab5a-f29852d47dc2.sql
data.summary: Replaces the get_user_tenant_id helper function using the updated SET search_path TO syntax for improved security compliance.

data.name: 20260327214000_add_profile_email.sql
data.summary: Adds an optional email column to the profiles table to store the user's real email address for transactions and notifications.

data.name: subscription_billing_history
data.summary: Billing history table recording Paystack subscription events (charge.success, invoice.payment_failed, etc.) per tenant with reference, amount, and status.

data.name: 20260328192957_add_subscription_billing_history.sql
data.summary: Creates the subscription_billing_history table with RLS so each tenant sees only their own billing events, plus indexes for fast lookup by tenant and Paystack reference.

data.name: tenants
data.summary: Root multi-tenant entity storing business identity, status, subscription tier, and soft-delete metadata. All other tenant-scoped tables cascade from this table via foreign key.

data.name: profiles
data.summary: Links Supabase auth users to their tenant, storing display name and phone number with format validation constraints.

data.name: clients
data.summary: Stores business clients per tenant with contact details, running balance, and status. Phone number is unique per tenant.

data.name: products
data.summary: Catalog of products or services offered by a tenant, with name, price, and optional description.

data.name: invoices
data.summary: Records invoices issued by a tenant to a client for a product, with status lifecycle (pending/paid/partial/overdue) and unique invoice numbers per tenant.

data.name: transactions
data.summary: Captures financial transactions (sales or payments) per tenant-client pair, optionally linked to an invoice.

data.name: notifications
data.summary: In-app notification records for tenant users, supporting invoice, payment, client, product, and system event types.

data.name: payment_details
data.summary: Stores per-tenant M-Pesa payment configuration entries (paybill, till, or account number) with active/inactive status.

data.name: user_roles
data.summary: Associates auth users with application roles (admin, user, client, superadmin) with uniqueness enforced per user-role pair.

data.name: super_admins
data.summary: Registry of platform-level super and support administrators, identified by user_id and email, with active status and last login tracking.

data.name: super_admin_audit_logs
data.summary: Immutable audit trail for super admin actions, capturing action type, affected resource, tenant, IP address, and user agent for governance.

data.name: tenant_subscriptions
data.summary: Tracks per-tenant subscription plan (free/pro/enterprise) with usage limits for users, clients, invoices, and products, plus billing lifecycle dates.

data.name: tenant_feature_flags
data.summary: Per-tenant feature flag toggles enabling runtime feature gating by flag name without code deploys.

data.name: tenant_usage_metrics
data.summary: Periodic usage snapshots per tenant recording user, client, invoice, and transaction counts alongside API calls and storage bytes for billing and analytics.

data.name: recreate_database.sql
data.summary: Complete Supabase database recreation script defining all 14 tables, 5 ENUM types, 1 view, 42 indexes, Row Level Security policies, and 15+ PL/pgSQL functions and triggers for the multi-tenant platform. Includes super admin governance, subscription management, and automated business logic triggers.

data.name: tenants (trial column)
data.summary: Migration target: adds trial_ends_at column to tenants with a 7-day default and backfills existing rows.

data.name: tenant_subscriptions (paystack columns)
data.summary: Migration target: adds Paystack integration columns (customer code, subscription code, next payment date, cancellation timestamp) to tenant_subscriptions.

data.name: add_subscription_columns.sql
data.summary: Additive migration extending the subscription model with trial period tracking on tenants and Paystack payment gateway fields on tenant_subscriptions. Includes trigger and helper function for automated trial assignment.

config.name: .env
config.summary: Environment variable file configuring runtime secrets for Supabase (URL, project ID, API key), Paystack payment gateway (test and production keys, plan codes for monthly/6-month/12-month tiers), Africa's Talking SMS credentials, and superadmin email.

config.name: components.json
config.summary: shadcn/ui CLI configuration specifying default style, TSX mode, Tailwind setup (config path, CSS entry, slate base color, CSS variables), and path aliases for components, utils, ui, lib, and hooks directories.

config.name: package.json
config.summary: Node.js project manifest defining build scripts (dev, build, lint, preview), runtime dependencies (React, Radix UI primitives, Supabase JS client, Tanstack Query, Paystack, Recharts, Zod, React Hook Form), and dev dependencies (Vite, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, ESLint).

config.name: tsconfig.app.json
config.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the React application source targeting ES2020 with react-jsx transform, bundler module resolution, the @/* path alias mapped to src/*, noEmit enabled, and strict mode disabled to allow gradual type safety adoption.

config.name: tsconfig.json
config.summary: Root TypeScript project file using composite project references to delegate compilation to tsconfig.app.json (src/ application code) and tsconfig.node.json (Vite config tooling), with shared loose compiler options and the @/* path alias.

config.name: tsconfig.node.json
config.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for Vite's Node.js tooling (vite.config.ts), using bundler module resolution with ESNext target and composite project reference support.

config.name: vercel.json
config.summary: Vercel deployment configuration with a catch-all rewrite rule that redirects all routes to index.html, enabling client-side routing for the React SPA.

config.name: config.toml
config.summary: Supabase project configuration specifying the project ID and disabling JWT verification for four Edge Functions: reset-password, resolve-login-email, create-client-user, and send-transaction-sms.

config.name: deno.json
config.summary: Deno configuration file for Supabase Edge Functions that pins the Deno standard library import map to version 0.177.0.

table:supabase/migrations/20260127224000.summary: Expands superadmin SELECT visibility to the clients, products, and invoices tables by replacing tenant-scoped policies with has_role-gated alternatives.

table:supabase/migrations/20260127230000.name: 20260127230000_comprehensive_superadmin_rls.sql
table:supabase/migrations/20260127230000.summary: Comprehensive RLS expansion ensuring superadmins can SELECT across all core tables: profiles, clients, products, invoices, transactions, and user_roles.

table:supabase/migrations/20260127233000.name: 20260127233000_superadmin_tenant_update_rls.sql
table:supabase/migrations/20260127233000.summary: Grants superadmins UPDATE access on the tenants table for managing activation state and subscription tiers.

table:supabase/migrations/20260128110000.name: 20260128110000_superadmin_user_management_rls.sql
table:supabase/migrations/20260128110000.summary: Grants superadmins full CRUD access on user_roles and refines the profile SELECT policy, also adding a foreign key from user_roles.user_id to profiles.user_id.

table:supabase/migrations/20260326193736.name: 20260326193736_673b14aa-788f-45bf-ab5a-f29852d47dc2.sql
table:supabase/migrations/20260326193736.summary: Replaces the get_user_tenant_id helper function using the updated SET search_path TO syntax for improved security compliance.

table:supabase/migrations/20260327214000.name: 20260327214000_add_profile_email.sql
table:supabase/migrations/20260327214000.summary: Adds an optional email column to the profiles table to store the user's real email address for transactions and notifications.

table:supabase/migrations/20260328192957.name: subscription_billing_history
table:supabase/migrations/20260328192957.summary: Billing history table recording Paystack subscription events (charge.success, invoice.payment_failed, etc.) per tenant with reference, amount, and status.

table:supabase/migrations/20260328192957.name: 20260328192957_add_subscription_billing_history.sql
table:supabase/migrations/20260328192957.summary: Creates the subscription_billing_history table with RLS so each tenant sees only their own billing events, plus indexes for fast lookup by tenant and Paystack reference.

config:.env.name: .env
config:.env.summary: Environment variable file configuring runtime secrets for Supabase (URL, project ID, API key), Paystack payment gateway (test and production keys, plan codes for monthly/6-month/12-month tiers), Africa's Talking SMS credentials, and superadmin email.

document:README.md.name: README.md
document:README.md.summary: Project overview for Nunua Polepole — a multi-tenant business directory and credit management platform. Covers core features, superadmin capabilities, local development setup, and the technology stack (Vite, React, TypeScript, shadcn/ui, Tailwind CSS, Supabase).

config:components.json.name: components.json
config:components.json.summary: shadcn/ui CLI configuration specifying default style, TSX mode, Tailwind setup (config path, CSS entry, slate base color, CSS variables), and path aliases for components, utils, ui, lib, and hooks directories.

file:index.html.name: index.html
file:index.html.summary: Vite SPA entry HTML document for LipiaPolePole credit management system. Declares viewport, favicon, Open Graph and Twitter card metadata, Google Fonts imports (Outfit + Plus Jakarta Sans), and the root div that bootstraps src/main.tsx.

config:package.json.name: package.json
config:package.json.summary: Node.js project manifest defining build scripts (dev, build, lint, preview), runtime dependencies (React, Radix UI primitives, Supabase JS client, Tanstack Query, Paystack, Recharts, Zod, React Hook Form), and dev dependencies (Vite, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, ESLint).

config:tsconfig.app.json.name: tsconfig.app.json
config:tsconfig.app.json.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for the React application source targeting ES2020 with react-jsx transform, bundler module resolution, the @/* path alias mapped to src/*, noEmit enabled, and strict mode disabled to allow gradual type safety adoption.

config:tsconfig.json.name: tsconfig.json
config:tsconfig.json.summary: Root TypeScript project file using composite project references to delegate compilation to tsconfig.app.json (src/ application code) and tsconfig.node.json (Vite config tooling), with shared loose compiler options and the @/* path alias.

config:tsconfig.node.json.name: tsconfig.node.json
config:tsconfig.node.json.summary: TypeScript compiler configuration for Vite's Node.js tooling (vite.config.ts), using bundler module resolution with ESNext target and composite project reference support.

config:vercel.json.name: vercel.json
config:vercel.json.summary: Vercel deployment configuration with a catch-all rewrite rule that redirects all routes to index.html, enabling client-side routing for the React SPA.

document:docs/ARCHITECTURE.md.name: ARCHITECTURE.md
document:docs/ARCHITECTURE.md.summary: Comprehensive domain-driven architecture guide for the Lipia Pole Pole credit management platform, covering 15 sections including bounded contexts, entity relationships, state machines, multi-tenancy patterns, authentication/authorization with RBAC, API layer patterns, error handling, and coding conventions.

document:docs/DEVELOPER.md.name: DEVELOPER.md
document:docs/DEVELOPER.md.summary: Developer-focused guide covering the multi-tenant SaaS architecture, database ERD with key tables, project directory structure, and step-by-step instructions for adding database migrations, new API endpoints, and Supabase Edge Functions.

document:docs/ROLES.md.name: ROLES.md
document:docs/ROLES.md.summary: Reference document for the platform's role-based access control (RBAC) system, defining the four-tier role hierarchy (Superadmin, Owner, Staff, Client), their respective permissions, and how roles are enforced at both the Supabase RLS database layer and the React frontend layer.

table:supabase/recreate_database.sql:ten.name: tenants
table:supabase/recreate_database.sql:ten.summary: Root multi-tenant entity storing business identity, status, subscription tier, and soft-delete metadata. All other tenant-scoped tables cascade from this table via foreign key.

table:supabase/recreate_database.sql:pro.name: profiles
table:supabase/recreate_database.sql:pro.summary: Links Supabase auth users to their tenant, storing display name and phone number with format validation constraints.

table:supabase/recreate_database.sql:cli.name: clients
table:supabase/recreate_database.sql:cli.summary: Stores business clients per tenant with contact details, running balance, and status. Phone number is unique per tenant.

table:supabase/recreate_database.sql:pro.name: products
table:supabase/recreate_database.sql:pro.summary: Catalog of products or services offered by a tenant, with name, price, and optional description.

table:supabase/recreate_database.sql:inv.name: invoices
table:supabase/recreate_database.sql:inv.summary: Records invoices issued by a tenant to a client for a product, with status lifecycle (pending/paid/partial/overdue) and unique invoice numbers per tenant.

table:supabase/recreate_database.sql:tra.name: transactions
table:supabase/recreate_database.sql:tra.summary: Captures financial transactions (sales or payments) per tenant-client pair, optionally linked to an invoice.

table:supabase/recreate_database.sql:not.name: notifications
table:supabase/recreate_database.sql:not.summary: In-app notification records for tenant users, supporting invoice, payment, client, product, and system event types.

table:supabase/recreate_database.sql:pay.name: payment_details
table:supabase/recreate_database.sql:pay.summary: Stores per-tenant M-Pesa payment configuration entries (paybill, till, or account number) with active/inactive status.

table:supabase/recreate_database.sql:use.name: user_roles
table:supabase/recreate_database.sql:use.summary: Associates auth users with application roles (admin, user, client, superadmin) with uniqueness enforced per user-role pair.

table:supabase/recreate_database.sql:sup.name: super_admins
table:supabase/recreate_database.sql:sup.summary: Registry of platform-level super and support administrators, identified by user_id and email, with active status and last login tracking.

table:supabase/recreate_database.sql:sup.name: super_admin_audit_logs
table:supabase/recreate_database.sql:sup.summary: Immutable audit trail for super admin actions, capturing action type, affected resource, tenant, IP address, and user agent for governance.

table:supabase/recreate_database.sql:ten.name: tenant_subscriptions
table:supabase/recreate_database.sql:ten.summary: Tracks per-tenant subscription plan (free/pro/enterprise) with usage limits for users, clients, invoices, and products, plus billing lifecycle dates.

table:supabase/recreate_database.sql:ten.name: tenant_feature_flags
table:supabase/recreate_database.sql:ten.summary: Per-tenant feature flag toggles enabling runtime feature gating by flag name without code deploys.

table:supabase/recreate_database.sql:ten.name: tenant_usage_metrics
table:supabase/recreate_database.sql:ten.summary: Periodic usage snapshots per tenant recording user, client, invoice, and transaction counts alongside API calls and storage bytes for billing and analytics.

schema:supabase/recreate_database.sql.name: recreate_database.sql
schema:supabase/recreate_database.sql.summary: Complete Supabase database recreation script defining all 14 tables, 5 ENUM types, 1 view, 42 indexes, Row Level Security policies, and 15+ PL/pgSQL functions and triggers for the multi-tenant platform. Includes super admin governance, subscription management, and automated business logic triggers.

table:supabase/add_subscription_columns..name: tenants (trial column)
table:supabase/add_subscription_columns..summary: Migration target: adds trial_ends_at column to tenants with a 7-day default and backfills existing rows.

table:supabase/add_subscription_columns..name: tenant_subscriptions (paystack columns)
table:supabase/add_subscription_columns..summary: Migration target: adds Paystack integration columns (customer code, subscription code, next payment date, cancellation timestamp) to tenant_subscriptions.

schema:supabase/add_subscription_columns.name: add_subscription_columns.sql
schema:supabase/add_subscription_columns.summary: Additive migration extending the subscription model with trial period tracking on tenants and Paystack payment gateway fields on tenant_subscriptions. Includes trigger and helper function for automated trial assignment.

config:supabase/config.toml.name: config.toml
config:supabase/config.toml.summary: Supabase project configuration specifying the project ID and disabling JWT verification for four Edge Functions: reset-password, resolve-login-email, create-client-user, and send-transaction-sms.

file:.understand-anything/.understandign.name: .understandignore
file:.understand-anything/.understandign.summary: Ignore rules for the understand-anything knowledge graph tool, listing file patterns (binaries, build artifacts, lockfiles, temp files) to exclude from codebase analysis.

file:bun.lockb.name: bun.lockb
file:bun.lockb.summary: Binary lockfile generated by the Bun package manager, pinning exact dependency versions for reproducible installs across environments.

file:eslint.config.js.name: eslint.config.js
file:eslint.config.js.summary: ESLint flat configuration enabling TypeScript-ESLint recommended rules, React Hooks linting, and React Refresh component-export warnings for the project's TypeScript and TSX files.

file:postcss.config.js.name: postcss.config.js
file:postcss.config.js.summary: PostCSS configuration file wiring in Tailwind CSS and Autoprefixer plugins for CSS processing during the Vite build pipeline.

document:public/robots.txt.name: robots.txt
document:public/robots.txt.summary: Robots exclusion file allowing all web crawlers unrestricted access to the site, with a sitemap reference pointing to the production domain.

file:src/App.css.name: App.css
file:src/App.css.summary: Root application CSS file providing base styles for the app container, logo animations, and card layout utilities used at the top-level component level.

file:src/components/ui/aspect-ratio.tsx.name: aspect-ratio.tsx
file:src/components/ui/aspect-ratio.tsx.summary: Thin re-export of the Radix UI AspectRatio primitive, exposing it as a named export for use in the project's shadcn/ui component library.

file:src/index.css.name: index.css
file:src/index.css.summary: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind CSS base/components/utilities directives, CSS custom properties for the design system (colors, radius, fonts), and dark mode theme tokens.

file:src/shared/utils/currency.ts.name: currency.ts
file:src/shared/utils/currency.ts.summary: Provides currency formatting and parsing utilities that localize monetary amounts and convert formatted currency strings back to numeric values.

file:src/shared/utils/date.ts.name: date.ts
file:src/shared/utils/date.ts.summary: Provides date formatting helpers for displaying dates in long, short, and human-readable relative formats (e.g., '2 days ago') throughout the application.

file:src/vite-env.d.ts.name: vite-env.d.ts
file:src/vite-env.d.ts.summary: Vite environment type declaration file that references Vite's client type definitions, enabling IntelliSense for import.meta.env and other Vite globals.

file:supabase/.temp/cli-latest.name: cli-latest
file:supabase/.temp/cli-latest.summary: Supabase CLI temporary state file recording the latest Supabase CLI version used with this project.

file:supabase/.temp/gotrue-version.name: gotrue-version
file:supabase/.temp/gotrue-version.summary: Supabase CLI temporary state file recording the GoTrue (authentication service) version for the local Supabase stack.

file:supabase/.temp/pooler-url.name: pooler-url
file:supabase/.temp/pooler-url.summary: Supabase CLI temporary state file storing the connection pooler URL for the linked Supabase project.

file:supabase/.temp/postgres-version.name: postgres-version
file:supabase/.temp/postgres-version.summary: Supabase CLI temporary state file recording the PostgreSQL version in use for the linked Supabase project.

file:supabase/.temp/project-ref.name: project-ref
file:supabase/.temp/project-ref.summary: Supabase CLI temporary state file storing the project reference ID for the linked remote Supabase project.

file:supabase/.temp/rest-version.name: rest-version
file:supabase/.temp/rest-version.summary: Supabase CLI temporary state file recording the PostgREST (REST API service) version for the local Supabase stack.

file:supabase/.temp/storage-migration.name: storage-migration
file:supabase/.temp/storage-migration.summary: Supabase CLI temporary state file tracking the applied storage migration version for the local Supabase stack.

file:supabase/.temp/storage-version.name: storage-version
file:supabase/.temp/storage-version.summary: Supabase CLI temporary state file recording the Supabase Storage service version for the local stack.

file:supabase/fix_sql.py.name: fix_sql.py
file:supabase/fix_sql.py.summary: One-off Python utility script that reorders sections 7 and 8 in the recreate_database.sql file, swapping the positions of RLS policies and database functions sections.

file:supabase/functions/create-client-us.name: index.ts
file:supabase/functions/create-client-us.summary: Supabase Edge Function that creates a new tenant-scoped client user via the Supabase Admin API, handling idempotent upsert of auth user, profile, and role records, with rollback on failure and post-creation notifications via Telegram and Africa's Talking SMS.

file:supabase/functions/delete-tenant/in.name: index.ts
file:supabase/functions/delete-tenant/in.summary: Supabase Edge Function restricted to superadmins that performs a cascading hard-delete of a tenant and all related data (transactions, payments, invoices, products, clients, subscriptions, user roles, profiles, and auth users) in FK-safe order.

config:supabase/functions/deno.json.name: deno.json
config:supabase/functions/deno.json.summary: Deno configuration file for Supabase Edge Functions that pins the Deno standard library import map to version 0.177.0.

file:supabase/functions/paystack-cancel/.name: index.ts
file:supabase/functions/paystack-cancel/.summary: Supabase Edge Function that cancels a Paystack subscription by fetching its secure email token and sending a disable request to the Paystack API, supporting both test and production environments.

file:supabase/functions/paystack-initial.name: index.ts
file:supabase/functions/paystack-initial.summary: Supabase Edge Function that initializes a Paystack subscription payment, applying prorated credit when a tenant upgrades mid-cycle, creating Paystack customers on demand, and returning a checkout authorization URL.

file:supabase/functions/paystack-webhook.name: index.ts
file:supabase/functions/paystack-webhook.summary: Supabase Edge Function that handles Paystack webhook events for subscription lifecycle management, including charge success, subscription creation, invoice payments, and cancellations. Verifies HMAC-SHA512 signatures, manages plan upgrades/downgrades with proration, logs billing history, and syncs tenant feature flags and usage metrics.

file:supabase/functions/reset-password/i.name: index.ts
file:supabase/functions/reset-password/i.summary: Supabase Edge Function that resets user passwords by generating a random 6-digit PIN, looking up user accounts by phone number via the profiles table, updating all matched user accounts, and sending the PIN via Africa's Talking SMS API with allowlist enforcement.

file:supabase/functions/resolve-login-em.name: index.ts
file:supabase/functions/resolve-login-em.summary: Supabase Edge Function that resolves a phone number to one or more Supabase Auth email addresses by querying the profiles table and fetching user records via the admin API, enabling phone-based login flows where email is the actual auth credential.

file:supabase/functions/send-transaction.name: index.ts
file:supabase/functions/send-transaction.summary: Supabase Edge Function that sends transactional SMS notifications to clients for sales invoices and payment receipts via Africa's Talking API, enforcing JWT authentication, tenant isolation, phone allowlists, and dynamic message formatting in KSH.

file:supabase/functions/setup-tenant/ind.name: index.ts
file:supabase/functions/setup-tenant/ind.summary: Supabase Edge Function that bootstraps a new tenant on first user signup: validates input with Zod, creates or reuses a tenant record, creates the user's profile, and assigns the 'admin' role to the first user of the tenant.

file:tailwind.config.ts.name: tailwind.config.ts
file:tailwind.config.ts.summary: Tailwind CSS configuration defining the design system for the application: custom semantic color tokens mapped to CSS variables (supporting dark mode via class), custom font families (Outfit and Plus Jakarta Sans), border radius tokens, and keyframe animations including accordion and floating effects.

file:vite.config.ts.name: vite.config.ts
file:vite.config.ts.summary: Vite build configuration enabling the React SWC plugin for fast compilation, the Lovable component tagger in development mode, and a path alias mapping '@' to the 'src' directory.
